servinfo.title: SDM Inspection

item.ptxt: Do not connect a tester whatever type it may be.

Be careful when handling a SDM so as not to cause vibration or impact including dropping. If SDM has been dropped, replace it even if there is no defect in appearance. Replace with new one in case of defect such as deformation and cracks.

servinfo.ptxt: If any faulty condition is found in the following checks, replace the SDM with new one.

item.ptxt: Check SDM for dents, cracks or deformation.
Check SDM connector for damage, cracks or lock mechanism.
Check SDM terminal for bend, corrosion or rust.
DTC B1013, B1021, B1024, B1025, B1026, B1028, B1029 or B1222 is stored in SDM.
